title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Gateway Distriparks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Gateway Distriparks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Distribution Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!
